profile_summary: A recent graduate with 0-2 years of experience in SEO, Product Management, and Marketing. Shows strong interest in remote work and digital marketing roles. Experienced with growth, product, and marketing functions with skills in SEO, Product Management, and Marketing strategies.

specializations.name: Digital Marketing / Performance Marketing
specializations.reasoning: Strong SEO and Meta Ads expertise combined with B2C marketing interest makes this a natural fit for performance marketing roles.

specializations.name: Growth Marketing
specializations.reasoning: Product management background and marketing skills position well for growth-focused roles in SaaS companies.

specializations.name: Product Marketing
specializations.reasoning: Intersection of product management and marketing skills, well-suited for product positioning and go-to-market roles.

recommended_roles.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
recommended_roles.reasoning: Direct match with SEO and Meta Ads skills. Remote-friendly role with high demand in growth-stage SaaS and e-commerce companies.

recommended_roles.title: Growth Marketing Associate
recommended_roles.reasoning: Combines marketing expertise with product sense. Growth-stage companies actively seek this profile for driving user acquisition and retention.

recommended_roles.title: SEO Specialist
recommended_roles.reasoning: Core SEO skills directly applicable. Remote-first roles widely available in this specialization.

recommended_roles.title: Product Marketing Associate
recommended_roles.reasoning: Product management background provides strong foundation for product positioning, competitive analysis, and launch strategies.

recommended_roles.title: Performance Marketing Analyst
recommended_roles.reasoning: Meta Ads experience and B2C marketing knowledge align well with paid acquisition and campaign optimization roles.

transition_paths: Digital Marketing Specialist → Senior Digital Marketer → Head of Marketing
Growth Marketing Associate → Growth Lead → VP of Growth
Product Marketing Associate → Senior PMM → Director of Product Marketing
